subject: Math

game_theme.title: Multiply Fractions by Whole Numbers
game_theme.badge_name: Multiply Fractions by Whole Numbers Badge
game_theme.mission_intro: Use understand a fraction as a multiple of a unit fraction and multiply fractions by whole numbers to help the Skill World crew solve a real Grade 4 math challenge.

lesson.story_mission: Join the Skill World crew and solve problems about understand a fraction as a multiple of a unit fraction and multiply fractions by whole numbers.
lesson.mini_lesson: In this lesson, you will understand a fraction as a multiple of a unit fraction and multiply fractions by whole numbers. Use models to keep the math organized and explain each answer.
lesson.objective: Understand a fraction as a multiple of a unit fraction and multiply fractions by whole numbers.
lesson.concept_explanation: Grade 4 mathematicians use visual models and precise vocabulary to understand a fraction as a multiple of a unit fraction and multiply fractions by whole numbers.
lesson.common_misconception: A common mistake is using the right numbers but the wrong relationship, part, group, or leftover.
lesson.real_world_connection: These skills help with sharing, comparing, measuring, cooking, planning, and checking real-world quantities.
lesson.lesson_summary: Read carefully, model the relationship, calculate with precision, and check for reasonableness.

audio.text: In this lesson, we practice Multiply Fractions by Whole Numbers. Use the visuals, listen to the page narration, and explain why your answer works.
audio.label: Listen to Lesson

story.text: Welcome to Multiply Fractions by Whole Numbers. In this mission, the Skill World crew needs your Grade 4 reasoning to solve understand a fraction as a multiple of a unit fraction and multiply fractions by whole numbers. Listen for unit fraction, multiple, repeated addition, whole number, product, fraction scaling, then press Start Mission when you are ready to connect the story to the math model.
story.label: Read This Page

lesson.text: This lesson teaches understand a fraction as a multiple of a unit fraction and multiply fractions by whole numbers. First read the objective and vocabulary. Then study how the model shows each number, because the visual will help you avoid common mistakes with unit fraction, multiple, repeated addition, whole number, product, fraction scaling. Press Next when you can explain the strategy in your own words.
lesson.label: Read This Page

watch.text: Watch this example like a tutor solving beside you. Step one is to read the question and name what is being asked. Step two is to model the quantities and labels, including unit fraction, multiple, repeated addition, whole number, product, fraction scaling. Step three is to calculate carefully and check that the final answer is reasonable. Press Next when the answer and model match.
watch.label: Read This Page

demo.text: This guided demo slows the thinking down. Read each label, say what each part of the model means, and connect the equation to the picture. Press Next when you can tell why the method works for understand a fraction as a multiple of a unit fraction and multiply fractions by whole numbers.
demo.label: Read This Page

practice.text: Now try a practice question with support. Tap Read Question first, use the visual model instead of guessing, and check that your answer fits unit fraction, multiple, repeated addition, whole number, product, fraction scaling. Use the hint if your first idea does not match the model, then press Next.
practice.label: Read This Page

challenge.text: This challenge gives you less help. Tap Read Question, choose a strategy, and explain how the model supports your answer. Check your work carefully before you press Next.
challenge.label: Read This Page

checkpoint.text: This checkpoint shows what you can do independently. Tap Read Question, solve with careful Grade 4 reasoning, and verify the answer against the model before you move on. Answer carefully, then press Next.
checkpoint.label: Read This Page

badge.text: Great work completing Multiply Fractions by Whole Numbers. This badge celebrates clear models, accurate calculations, and math language that explains unit fraction, multiple, repeated addition, whole number, product, fraction scaling. Press Save Growth Data to add this skill to your profile.
badge.label: Read This Page

profile.text: Your profile summarizes this mission and offers more practice. Choose Continue to Skill Practice to work through four focused levels and a Mixed level, or go back to the hub when you are ready. This final page helps you choose the next best step based on today's work.
profile.label: Read This Page
